titles: 전고점 81포인트 남았는데 외국인 6,200억 매도…4일 뒤 결판난다
코스피 6,307 직전 외국인이 돌아선 진짜 이유 | 휴전 만료 4일 전
코스피 전고점 vs 전쟁 재개, 이번 주말이 갈린다 | 2,000만원의 차이

image_concepts.A: 거대한 금색 코스피 숫자판이 균열과 함께 갈라지는 긴장감 있는 장면
image_concepts.B: 어두운 회의장의 빈 의자 두 개가 마주보고 있는 협상 결렬 장면

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 A 실사. 거대한 금색 전광판에 6307이라는 숫자가 표시되어 있고, 그 숫자판 중앙에서 균열이 퍼지며 갈라지는 순간. 네이비 배경에 골드 빛의 숫자가 긴장감을 자아내는 시네마틱 장면.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of a massive golden digital stock market display board showing the number 6307 in bold illuminated digits. Deep cracks and fractures are spreading dramatically from the center of the board, with golden sparks and fragments flying outward. The scene is lit with intense dramatic side lighting against a deep navy blue background, creating an ominous atmosphere of tension and crisis. The golden numbers contrast sharply with the dark navy environment, with subtle gold particle effects floating in the air. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 B 실사. 어두운 격식 있는 외교 회의장에서 빈 의자 두 개가 긴 테이블 양쪽에 마주보고 있는 장면. 테이블 위에 미국 국기와 이란 국기 소형 깃발이 놓여 있고, 배경의 창문으로 어두운 하늘이 보이는 긴장감 있는 구도.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of a dark formal diplomatic negotiation room with two empty leather chairs facing each other across a long polished mahogany table. Small table flags of the United States and Iran are placed on the table between the chairs. The room is dimly lit with dramatic overhead spotlighting creating deep shadows and an ominous atmosphere of failed negotiations. A large window in the background shows a stormy dark sky with navy blue tones. Gold-framed paintings line the walls, reflecting the tension and shock of diplomatic breakdown. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 와일드카드. 거대한 체스판 위에 금색 불(bull) 조각상과 검은색 곰(bear) 조각상이 대치하고 있는 장면. 체스판 중앙에 균열이 있고, 한쪽은 밝은 골드빛, 반대쪽은 어두운 네이비 빛으로 나뉘어 두 시나리오를 상징.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of a giant chess board with a magnificent golden bull statue on one side facing a menacing dark bear statue on the opposite side. The chess board is cracking down the middle with a dramatic fissure, one half bathed in warm golden light symbolizing market triumph and the other half shrouded in deep navy blue shadows symbolizing crisis. Bright vibrant colors with high-key dramatic lighting create an atmosphere of extreme tension and shock. Golden sparks fly upward from the bull side while dark smoke rises from the bear side. The bottom 40% of the image transitions from the scene into pure solid black (#000000) through a smooth gradient fade. The gradient starts at the 60% line and becomes fully black by the 75% line. The remaining bottom 25% is completely solid black with no elements.
